reasons: Faramis can protect Gloo's committed frontline timing with a teamfight survival window.
Gloo's attach and disruption can keep enemies occupied while Faramis helps the team continue the fight.

proof.summary: Gloo commits into the enemy formation, while Faramis gives a teamfight survival layer that helps Gloo stay active during the dangerous attach or frontline window.
worksBestWhen: Faramis saves his ultimate for Gloo's real engage or objective fight.
Gloo commits while teammates are ready to fight inside Faramis's protected area.
failureCases: Faramis uses ultimate before Gloo commits.
Gloo attaches too far away from Faramis's protected area.
Enemy burst removes Faramis or forces him away before the teamfight starts.

reasons: Carmilla can link clustered enemies while Gloo forces them into a close-range fight.
Gloo's frontline pressure gives Carmilla a realistic chance to connect her teamfight link.

proof.summary: Gloo forces enemies to respond to his frontline pressure, while Carmilla links clustered enemies so the team can punish them together.
worksBestWhen: Gloo starts the fight before Carmilla commits her link.
Carmilla hits multiple enemies near Gloo's pressure zone.
failureCases: Enemies spread before Carmilla links them.
Gloo attaches to a target too far away from the team.
The team lacks damage follow-up after the link.

reasons: Yve can punish the area where Gloo is disrupting enemy movement.
Gloo's immobilize and displacement pressure help keep enemies inside Yve's zoning area.

proof.summary: Gloo creates a disruptive frontline fight, while Yve layers area damage and slow pressure over the same space.
worksBestWhen: Gloo fights inside Yve's cast range.
Yve waits until enemies are forced to respond to Gloo's engage.
failureCases: Enemies spread away from Gloo's pressure zone.

reasons: Pharsa can punish the target Gloo attaches to or disrupts from long range.
Gloo gives Pharsa a clearer target focus by forcing enemy attention into the frontline.

proof.summary: Gloo disrupts or attaches to a target, while Pharsa follows from range with burst damage.
worksBestWhen: Gloo commits after Pharsa is ready to cast.
Pharsa has safe vision and angle on Gloo's target.
failureCases: Enemy divers pressure Pharsa before she can follow up.
Gloo is forced to detach or disengage too early.

reasons: Angela can reinforce Gloo when he commits into the enemy formation.
Gloo's extended frontline play gives Angela a clear host for shield and support timing.

proof.summary: Angela adds survivability to Gloo's dive or attach window, helping him stay active longer in the frontline.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches as Gloo begins the real engage.
Gloo does not dive beyond team follow-up range.
failureCases: Gloo is isolated before Angela can support.
Enemy burst or anti-sustain removes the shield value.
